allow: PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\ChaeDong\\OneDrive\\Vive_coding\\AI_invest\\.env | Select-String "ADMIN_SECRET_KEY" | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace "ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=", "" }\).Trim\(\); $headers = @{ "x-admin-key" = $key }; Write-Output "Generating US..."; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/v1/admin/generate?market=us" -Method POST -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 300 -UseBasicParsing; "US: $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\(\($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).id\)")

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\ChaeDong\\OneDrive\\Vive_coding\\AI_invest\\.env | Select-String "ADMIN_SECRET_KEY" | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace "ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=", "" }\).Trim\(\); $headers = @{ "x-admin-key" = $key }; Write-Output "Generating KR..."; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/v1/admin/generate?market=kr" -Method POST -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 300 -UseBasicParsing; "KR: $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\(\($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).id\)")

PowerShell($us = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/v1/reports/latest?market=us" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "=== US \($\($us.date\)\) — $\($us.risk_level\) ==="; $us.stocks | ForEach-Object { "  [$\($_.score\)] $\($_.ticker\) $\($_.company_name\) | 매수:$$\($_.buy_price\) 목표:$$\($_.target_price\) 손절:$$\($_.stop_price\)" }; Write-Output ""; $kr = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/v1/reports/latest?market=kr" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "=== KR \($\($kr.date\)\) — $\($kr.risk_level\) ==="; $kr.stocks | ForEach-Object { "  [$\($_.score\)] $\($_.ticker\) $\($_.company_name\) | 매수:$\([math]::Round\($_.buy_price\)\)원 목표:$\([math]::Round\($_.target_price\)\)원 손절:$\([math]::Round\($_.stop_price\)\)원" })

PowerShell($us = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/?market=us" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "US page status: $\($us.StatusCode\), length: $\($us.Content.Length\)"; $us.Content | Select-String "AAPL|Risk|추천|뉴스|섹터" | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })

PowerShell($kr = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/?market=kr" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "KR page status: $\($kr.StatusCode\)"; $kr.Content | Select-String "한화|항공|LG화학|삼성전자|KOSPI|Risk" | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120, $_.Line.Length\)\).Trim\(\) })

PowerShell($kr = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/?market=kr" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; if \($kr.Content -match "012450|047810|Risk-On|KOSPI"\) { "KR data found in page" } else { "KR data NOT found" }; if \($kr.Content -match "준비 중"\) { "Still showing fallback!" } else { "Showing real data" })

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\ChaeDong\\OneDrive\\Vive_coding\\AI_invest\\.env | Select-String "ADMIN_SECRET_KEY" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -replace "ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=",""\).Trim\(\) }\); $h = @{"x-admin-key"=$key}; Write-Output "Sending US report..."; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/v1/admin/notify?market=us" -Method POST -Headers $h -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\ChaeDong\\OneDrive\\Vive_coding\\AI_invest\\.env | Select-String "ADMIN_SECRET_KEY" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -replace "ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=",""\).Trim\(\) }\); $h = @{"x-admin-key"=$key}; Write-Output "Sending KR report..."; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/v1/admin/notify?market=kr" -Method POST -Headers $h -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($token = "9beee1fb-54e1-4a8a-896b-697d643243fa"; $body = '{"query":"{ me { name email } }"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://backboard.railway.app/graphql/v2" -Method POST -Headers @{"Authorization"="Bearer $token"; "Content-Type"="application/json"} -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4)
